commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Amendment. St. Jerome (ad Evag.) says, after Thucydides: "Ignorance produces confidence, and learning fear."

commentaries.author: John Cassian
commentaries.content: In all things be “quick to listen and slow to speak” lest the remark of Solomon be fulfilled in you: “If you see a man too ready of speech, know that a fool has more hope than he.” And never dare to teach someone what you have not practiced yourself.
